# CSSH third-party notices

`CSSH.xcframework` is built from unmodified release sources by
`scripts/build_cssh.sh`.

- libssh2 1.11.1: BSD 3-Clause, https://github.com/libssh2/libssh2
  - Complete text: `licenses/libssh2-COPYING`
- OpenSSL 3.5.7 LTS: Apache License 2.0, https://github.com/openssl/openssl
  - Complete text: `licenses/openssl-LICENSE.txt`

The complete upstream license texts are shipped next to the XCFramework.
Binary redistribution must retain the copyright notices and license terms
from both projects.
